rulings.Case Title: MARIE LAVIN VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ADULT PROBAT
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion For Recinsideration Of Order Granting In Part Defts. Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Or In The Alternative, For Relief Due To Excusable Neglect, Inadvertence Or Mistake
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION ON JUDGMENT ON PLEADING DENIED. THE COURT SUA SPONTE RECONSIDERS AND GRANTS LEAVE TO AMEND THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION - FAILURE TO PROVIDE SAFE WORK ENVIRONMENT, AND TENTH CAUSE OF ACTION - NEGLIGENT RETENTION TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY TO ALLEGE CITY'S FAILURE TO TAKE STEPS TO PROTECT THE PLTF CONSTITUTES RATIFICATION OF INTENTIONAL CONDUCT NOT BARRED BY WORKMANS CONPENSATION. (CL)

rulings.Case Title: SAFIRA CT. HOMEOWNERS ASSO VS KROOPNICK
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Strike X-Action And Joinder In Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: MOTIONS TO STRIKE DENIED. DEMURRER OVERRULED. LITIGATION PREVILEGED NOT APPLICABLE BECAUSE CONDUCT ALLEGED NOT PUBLICATIONS. HOWEVER ATTORNEY FRASER AND SCHMIDT'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED. ALLEGED ACTIVITY COVERED BY 425.16 (b)(1) ACTS IN FURTHERANCE OF RIGHT TO PETITION. (AA)
